data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): The .test-index RED marker entry should map to scale-inference.md (the file being tested), NOT to brainstorm/SKILL.md. Correct format: [test_scale_inference_prompt_exists] plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/scale-inference.md tests/skills/test-scale-inference-shared-prompt.sh — This ensures the test gate fires when scale-inference.md is modified, not on every brainstorm/SKILL.md touch. Update AC to verify the marker maps to scale-inference.md.
